summary: Iteration 143: Quick Reset Frequency Play Fix - All tests PASSED. The Quick Reset frequency button now plays the frequency instantly via MixerContext instead of navigating to /frequencies page. Button state changes correctly between 'Tap to play instantly' and 'Playing — tap to stop'. Toast notifications show 'Playing XXX Hz' and 'Stopped XXX Hz'. Regression tests for Dashboard, Cosmic Mixer, and SmartDock language selector all passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quick Reset frequency play fix verified working. The QuickResetModal in Landing.js uses useMixer().toggleFreq to play frequencies instantly without navigation. All 7 languages in SmartDock language panel working. Dashboard and Cosmic Mixer pages load correctly.

quick_reset_frequency_play.quick_reset_button: PASS - Button found with data-testid='quick-reset-btn' on landing page
quick_reset_frequency_play.modal_appears: PASS - Modal with data-testid='quick-reset-modal' appears with feeling options
quick_reset_frequency_play.feeling_selection: PASS - Clicked 'Happy' feeling, flow loaded with 528 Hz frequency recommendation
quick_reset_frequency_play.frequency_button_initial_state: PASS - Shows 'Tap to play instantly' badge
quick_reset_frequency_play.frequency_plays_in_place: PASS - Clicking frequency button plays audio WITHOUT navigating to /frequencies
quick_reset_frequency_play.button_state_changes_to_playing: PASS - Button changes to 'Playing — tap to stop' with pulsing Volume2 icon
quick_reset_frequency_play.toast_notification: PASS - Toast shows 'Playing 528 Hz - Love & Transformation'
quick_reset_frequency_play.frequency_stops_on_second_click: PASS - Clicking again stops frequency, button returns to 'Tap to play instantly'

regression_dashboard.dashboard_loads: PASS - Dashboard shows 'Welcome back, Happy' with 3-day streak
regression_dashboard.shortcuts_visible: PASS - My Shortcuts section with Breathe, Mood, Journal, Meditate, Oracle, Stars, Blessings, Crystals, Briefing
regression_dashboard.sacred_scriptures: PASS - Sacred Scriptures section with chapters and journeys

regression_cosmic_mixer.page_loads: PASS - Cosmic Mixer page loads correctly
regression_cosmic_mixer.ai_frequency_blend: PASS - AI Frequency Blend section visible
regression_cosmic_mixer.master_fx_bus: PASS - Master FX Bus section visible

smartdock_language_selector.globe_icon_clickable: PASS - Globe icon in SmartDock opens language panel
smartdock_language_selector.seven_languages: PASS - All 7 languages found: EN (English), ES (Spanish), FR (French), HI (Hindi), JA (Japanese), AR (Arabic), PT (Portuguese)

bug_fix_verified.issue: Quick Reset frequency button navigated to /frequencies page instead of playing frequency
bug_fix_verified.fix_description: QuickResetModal now uses useMixer().toggleFreq to play frequencies instantly via MixerContext
bug_fix_verified.verification: Clicking frequency button in Quick Reset modal plays audio in place, button state changes to 'Playing — tap to stop', toast shows 'Playing XXX Hz', and page does NOT navigate away
